description: Multiple unspecified vulnerabilities in the Email Server component in Oracle Collaboration Suite 9.0.4.2, 10.1.1, 10.1.2.0, and 10.1.2.1 have unknown impact and attack vectors, aka Vuln# (1) OCS01, (2) OCS02, (3) OCS03, and (4) OCS04.
